title: NLP-022-what-is-perplexity-and-how-does-it-evaluate-language-models
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-022 What is perplexity and how does it evaluate language models?

 22. What is perplexity and how does it evaluate language models?
答案要点:
- 定义: 衡量模型预测样本的不确定性
- 公式: Perplexity = exp(-1/N × Σ log P(w_i))
- 解释: 越低越好 (模型越"不惊讶")
- 使用: Language Model Evaluation, Model Comparison

质量评分: 91/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---
